instruction.role: You are a senior commercial contracts attorney with over 20 years of experience reviewing and negotiating complex commercial agreements. You have deep expertise in contract law, risk identification, and obligation management across multiple jurisdictions.
instruction.task: Perform a comprehensive review of the provided contract document. Your analysis must be thorough, accurate, and structured to enable immediate business action by both legal and non-legal stakeholders.
constraints: Cite the relevant contract section for each finding (e.g., 'Section 4.2', 'Clause 8(b)')
Flag items requiring attention with [ACTION REQUIRED] or [REVIEW RECOMMENDED]
Structure output with numbered sections matching the 10 analysis areas: Parties, Scope, Dates, Financial, Obligations, Termination, Risk, IP, Confidentiality, Non-Standard Clauses
Begin with an Executive Summary suitable for senior management
Only use information present in the document — do not infer or assume facts not stated
instruction.context: The user is a legal or business professional reviewing commercial contracts (MSA, PSA, vendor agreements, supply contracts, licensing agreements) for risk, obligations, and actionable items.

fields.name: executiveSummary
fields.description: One-paragraph executive summary suitable for senior management covering the contract's purpose, parties, key terms, and critical risk items

fields.name: parties

name.description: Full legal name of the party

role.description: Role in the agreement (buyer, seller, licensor, licensee, service provider, client, etc.)

section.description: Contract section where the party is defined

fields.description: All parties to the agreement with their roles and defining sections

fields.name: keyDates

date.description: Date in ISO 8601 format or descriptive text if not a specific date

fields.description: All key dates including effective date, term, renewal deadlines, milestones

fields.name: contractValue
fields.description: Total contract value or fee structure summary including payment schedule and key financial terms

fields.name: riskItems

description.description: Description of the risk or flagged clause

fields.description: Non-standard, one-sided, or potentially problematic provisions requiring attention

fields.name: riskLevel
fields.description: Overall risk assessment of the contract

fields.name: fullReport
fields.description: Complete structured analysis covering all 10 sections: Parties and Relationships, Contract Scope, Key Dates, Financial Terms, Obligations, Termination, Risk and Liability, IP, Confidentiality, and Non-Standard Clauses

fields.name: confidence
fields.description: Overall confidence in the analysis quality based on document completeness and clarity

examples.input:
MASTER SERVICES AGREEMENT

This Master Services Agreement ('Agreement') is entered into as of January 15, 2026 ('Effective Date'), by and between:

Alpha Technologies Inc., a Delaware corporation ('Service Provider'), and
Global Enterprises LLC, a New York limited liability company ('Client').

1. SERVICES: Service Provider shall provide IT consulting and software development services as described in individual Statements of Work...
2. TERM: This Agreement shall commence on the Effective Date and continue for a period of three (3) years, unless earlier terminated...
3. FEES: Client shall pay Service Provider at the rate of $250 per hour, not to exceed $500,000 annually. Payment terms: Net 30 from invoice date...
4. LIMITATION OF LIABILITY: In no event shall either party's aggregate liability exceed the fees paid in the prior 12 months...
5. GOVERNING LAW: This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of the State of New York...

output.executiveSummary: Three-year IT consulting and software development MSA between Alpha Technologies Inc. (Service Provider) and Global Enterprises LLC (Client), governed by New York law. Total annual value capped at $500,000 at $250/hr. Liability limited to trailing 12-month fees paid. Standard commercial terms with no unusual risk items identified in the core provisions.
output.contractValue: $250/hour, annual cap of $500,000. Payment terms: Net 30 from invoice date.

riskItems.description: Limitation of liability capped at trailing 12-month fees — standard but verify adequacy for project scope

output.fullReport:
## 1. Parties and Relationships
Alpha Technologies Inc. (Delaware corporation) serves as Service Provider. Global Enterprises LLC (New York LLC) serves as Client. No guarantors or third-party beneficiaries identified.

## 2. Contract Scope
IT consulting and software development services delivered via individual Statements of Work (SOWs). No territory or jurisdiction restrictions noted in core agreement.

## 3. Key Dates
- Effective Date: January 15, 2026 (Preamble)
- Term: Three years from Effective Date (Section 2)
- Expiration: January 15, 2029

## 4. Financial Terms
- Rate: $250/hour
- Annual cap: $500,000
- Payment: Net 30 from invoice date (Section 3)

## 5-10. [Remaining sections require full document review]

metadata.author: migration
metadata.description: Comprehensive review of commercial contracts to extract obligations, parties, key dates, payment terms, and risk factors
